annotations.description: Indicates whether the absence is recorded in basic mode or advanced mode. The default value is true.
Unique code assigned to the absence pattern associated with an absence type. For example, absence pattern can be Generic for a vacation absence, Illness or injury for a sickness absence.
Absence status, such as submitted, withdrawn.
Unique identifier for the absence type.
Unique identifier for the absence reason.
Determines whether the worker is eligible for block leave or not. Block leave enables workers to report a fixed period away from work.
Comments provided while recording the absence.
Condition start date of an illness or injury leave. Used to indicate when the illness began or injury occurred, and could be different from the absence start date.

Latest date and time the absence record was updated.
User name of the employee who last updated the absence record.
Name of the employee who last updated the absence record.
Indicates an absence notification that qualifies as a late notification and is waived.
Date the employee notifies the employer of an upcoming absence.

Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
Indicates whether the absence is open-ended. Enables workers to submit an absence without entering an absence end date. The default value is false.
Indicates whether the absence duration has been overridden or not. The default value is false.

Unique identifier for the person.
Indicates whether the absence request is for a single day. Default value is false.

Start date of the recorded absence.
Duration of the absence on the start date. This field allows the duration of the start date to be different than what's derived from the shift duration.

Start time of the recorded absence.

Unit of measure used to record the absence, such as days or hours.

Unique identifier for the absence type.
Name of the employer.
Reason for absence attached to the absence type.

annotations.title: Search existing absences
annotations.description: Searches existing absences based on various parameters.

parameters.name: autocompleteQuery
parameters.description: Autocomplete query for existing absences

parameters.name: displayFields
parameters.description: Existing absences search display results

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filter condition for existing absences

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of rows allowed in existing absences search

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Results set offset of existing absences search

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: User entered search criteria for existing absences

parameters.name: searchFields
parameters.description: User entered search fields for existing absences

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort condition for existing absences

parameters.name: userContext
parameters.description: User entered context of employee or manager for existing absences

return.description: Set of results of the existing absences search

annotations.title: Get an absence type balance
annotations.description: Provides the absence type balance for the selected absence type. This includes all absence plans associated with the selected absence type.

parameters.name: assignmentId
parameters.description: Balance of the absence type based on the assignment ID.

parameters.name: effectiveDate
parameters.description: Balance of the absence type based on the effective date.

parameters.name: personId
parameters.description: Balance of the absence type based on the person ID.

parameters.name: typeId
parameters.description: Balance of the absence type based on the type ID.

parameters.name: userContext
parameters.description: Balance of the absence type based on the user context or role.

return.description: Return balance of the absence type.

annotations.title: Display daily and shift details of the absence request
annotations.description: Displays the individual date and shift breakdown details of the absence request.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit of the absence request to display daily breakdown and shift breakdown.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the absence request to display daily breakdown and shift breakdown.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: Parameters of the absence request to display daily breakdown and shift breakdown.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort the shift and daily breakdown of the absence request.

parameters.name: userContext
parameters.description: User context of the absence request to display daily breakdown and shift breakdown.

return.description: Return shift and daily breakdown of the absence request.

annotations.title: Display absence cases based on search criteria
annotations.description: Displays the absence cases found based on user search criteria.

parameters.name: autocompleteQuery
parameters.description: Autocomplete query for absence case search request.

parameters.name: displayFields
parameters.description: Display options for absence cases search request.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filter conditions for absence case search request.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit of the absence case search request to display absence cases.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the absence case advanced search request.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Query of the absence case search request.

parameters.name: searchFields
parameters.description: Search options for absence cases.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort options for absence cases.

parameters.name: userContext
parameters.description: User context of the absence case search request.

return.description: Return absence cases based on search request.

annotations.title: Display absence type projected balance.
annotations.description: Displays the projected absence type balance based on the absence type balance and absence transactions through the absence end date.

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: Projected balance of the absence type based on the absence request.

parameters.name: entryDetails
parameters.description: Projected balance of the absence type based on the absence request in the daily details entry region.

return.description: Return projected balance of the absence type.

annotations.title: Reprocess absences and run postapproval process
annotations.description: Reprocesses absences and runs postapproval process for the worker's absences with errors.

parameters.name: personId
parameters.description: Person identifier to reprocess absences and run the postapproval process.

return.description: Return absences based on the search request.

annotations.title: Show absence plan usage
annotations.description: Shows the usage of absence plans for the worker's absence.

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: Entry of the absence plan use.

parameters.name: entryDetails
parameters.description: Entry of the absence plan use details

return.description: Plan use based on the search request.

annotations.title: Download a stack trace file
annotations.description: Downloads a stack trace file of the absences with errors.

parameters.name: personAbsenceEntryId
parameters.description: Person absence entry identifier for the stack trace file download.

return.description: Return of success or failure of download of stack trace file.

annotations.title: Enter an override payment percentage for an absence
annotations.description: Enters an override payment percentage to override the plan payment percentage for that absence.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date within the duration of the absence when the payment percentage is overridden.

parameters.name: perAbsenceEntryId
parameters.description: Absence entry identifier associated with the override payment percentage.

parameters.name: planActivity
parameters.description: Plan activity for the override payment percentage.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: Plan identifier to override payment percentage.

parameters.name: pmtPercent
parameters.description: Percentage value that overrides the payment percentage of the plan of the worker for a given absence duration.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Reason for override payment percentage.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date within the duration of the absence when the payment percentage is overridden.

return.description: Indicates whether the override payment percentage was applied or not.

annotations.title: Retrieve user access details
annotations.description: Returns user's roles, permissions, and login activity details.

parameters.name: assignmentId
parameters.description: Returns assignment ID for specified user.

parameters.name: effectiveDate
parameters.description: Returns effective date of assignment for specified user.

parameters.name: flowName
parameters.description: Returns the business process flow name triggered for specified user.

parameters.name: personId
parameters.description: Returns person ID for specified user.

parameters.name: userMode
parameters.description: Returns role for specified user.

return.description: Returns the result for specified user.

annotations.title: Check active scheduling profile.
annotations.description: Checks active scheduling profile exists or not for a given employee and absence type.

parameters.name: assignmentId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of an assignment.

parameters.name: personId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for a person.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date when the scheduling profile became active.

parameters.name: typeId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for an absence type.

parameters.name: userMode
parameters.description: Mode of the user.

annotations.title: Restrict edit for absences
annotations.description: Restricts edits for absences for managers and employees depending on the editing rule configuration.

parameters.name: userContext
parameters.description: User context when editing an absence with restrictions.

return.description: Indicates whether lock editing rule was applied or not.

properties.DESCRIPTION: The identifier used to track asynchronous background uploads of file contents.  This field can only be used when the DatatypeCode="FILE".  When queried it will only show when the ErrorCode="Pending" which signifies that a background upload has been registered but not yet completed.  The async tracker id can only be set upon creation of an attachment.  If the FileContents and tracker id are set then the tracker will be ignored.
